name: Conceptboard Visual Collaboration Platform API
what_it_does: Visual collaboration and whiteboarding platform with REST API — enabling distributed teams to brainstorm, plan, and collaborate on infinite whiteboards with real-time co-editing, sticky notes, templates, image/PDF import, and video integration, with enterprise features including SSO, on-premises deployment option, and granular access controls.
use_cases: Creating and managing Conceptboard whiteboards via API for team workflow automation
Integrating Conceptboard boards with project management tools via API for visual planning
Managing team members and access controls in Conceptboard via API for enterprise governance
Embedding Conceptboard whiteboards in web applications via API-generated embed codes
Querying Conceptboard workspace usage and collaboration metrics for reporting
not_for: Technical diagramming and architecture (use Lucidchart or Draw.io for structured diagrams)
High-fidelity UI design (use Figma for pixel-perfect interface design)
Video conferencing (use Zoom or Teams — Conceptboard integrates with, not replaces, video tools)
best_when: A European enterprise team needs a GDPR-compliant whiteboarding tool with on-premises deployment option — especially for industries with strict data residency requirements (healthcare, finance, government) where cloud-only tools like Miro are insufficient.
avoid_when: You have no data residency requirements and prefer best-of-breed features, as Miro or MURAL offer more advanced templates and integrations for teams without on-premises needs.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. API key option for server integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. No webhooks. On-premises deployment option for enterprise. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. REST API for workspace and board management. Integration with Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Slack.

pricing.paid_tiers: Team $7.50/user/month; Business $14/user/month; Enterprise custom; On-premises custom
pricing.notes: German company (Stuttgart). Founded 2012. Bootstrapped and profitable. German engineering company with strong security and compliance focus. GDPR-compliant with EU data residency. On-premises deployment option is key differentiator vs. Miro and MURAL. Popular in European enterprise, healthcare, and government sectors where cloud data residency is restricted. Strong in automotive (Daimler, Porsche) and manufacturing. ISO 27001 certified. German privacy culture built into product.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for workspace and board management. OAuth2 + API key auth. Limited public API documentation. No webhooks. German company with strong security focus. On-premises option adds deployment complexity. Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Slack integrations are pre-built connectors, not API-based. Rate limits not publicly documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Board reads fully idempotent. Workspace reads idempotent. Board creation not idempotent — check by name before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: On-premises deployment adds significant setup and maintenance complexity
No webhooks — must poll for board change events
Limited public API documentation — primary value is the collaborative UI
German language documentation may be more detailed than English docs
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, ISO27001, SOC2 compliant. EU and German data residency. OAuth2 auth. German company with privacy-first engineering culture. On-premises deployment eliminates cloud data residency concerns. Board content may contain confidential strategic plans — use granular access controls. SAML SSO for enterprise identity management. ISO 27001 certification provides audited security controls.
